semantic.role: Database infrastructure and persistence layer implementation
responsibilities: Implement the Database class to manage underlying connection state
Provide a generic query method for executing SQL-like commands
Serve as the concrete implementation layer for application data persistence
outOfScope: Business logic or domain model definitions

English.purpose: This document defines the database infrastructure module responsible for managing connection state and providing a generic query interface for data persistence.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers working on the persistence layer of the ArchSpine system who need to understand how database connections are managed and how queries are executed.
key_takeaways: The Database class encapsulates connection lifecycle management
A generic query method provides SQL-like command execution
This module is the concrete persistence implementation for the application

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档定义了数据库基础设施模块，负责管理连接状态并提供通用的查询接口以实现数据持久化。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于 ArchSpine 系统中负责持久化层的开发者，需要了解数据库连接的管理方式以及查询的执行机制。
key_takeaways: Database 类封装了连接生命周期的管理
通用的 query 方法提供了类似 SQL 的命令执行能力
该模块是应用程序数据持久化的具体实现层
